commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Windows QMD command resolution, scoped QMD fallback package lookup, OpenAI-compatible URL image parsing/downloads, Plugin SDK exports, tests, dependency files, and scoped CLAUDE.md files.

PR surface: Source +153, Tests +119, Docs 0, Config +1, Other +735. Total +1008 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main only parses %~dp0-relative cmd shim targets and only accepts OpenAI-compatible b64_json image entries. I did not run a failing current-main Windows/NewAPI live repro in this read-only pass.
